title: A data migration system by tdmf product
abstract: The present invention relates to a data migration system (1) by TDMF product for carrying out a data migration process more safely and quickly by TDMF (Transparent Data Migration Facility) that provides a continuous data migration by directing data input/output between source and target storage transparently.
claims: Claims 1. A data migration system (1) by TDMF product for carrying out a data migration process more safely and quickly by TDMF that provides a continuous data migration by directing data input/output between source and target storage transparently; comprising at least one data list (2) which will be migrated by TDMF; and characterized by at least one server (3) which is configured to detect accumulated data (spool volume), to control equality of source and target data numbers, to carry out transaction according to data types and to realize preparation and termination of tasks by analysing the list of input data. 2. A data migration system (1) by TDMF product according to Claim 1; characterized by the data list (2) which is configured to indicate the data group to be migrated by TDMF. 3. A data migration system (1) by TDMF product according to Claim 1 or 2; characterized by the data list (2) which is configured to provide a data list input for the server (3). 4. A data migration system (1) by TDMF product according to any of the preceding claims; characterized by the server (3) which is configured to manage the data migration process by TDMF. 5. A data migration system (1) by TDMF product according to any of the preceding claims; characterized by the server (3) which is configured to detect the type of data to be migrated by controlling the data list (2). 6. A data migration system (1) by TDMF product according to any of the preceding claims; characterized by the server (3) which is configured to end the data transfer process and to request update of the data list (2) by removing the said data type from the data list (2), in the event that the type of data detected is a data characterized asâspool volumeâ. 7. A data migration system (1) by TDMF product according to any of the preceding claims; characterized by the server (3) which is configured to control the equality status of source and target data numbers. 8. A data migration system (1) by TDMF product according to any of the preceding claims; characterized by the server (3) which is configured to control the availability status of a repetitive data in the data list (2). 9. A data migration system (1) by TDMF product according to any of the preceding claims; characterized by the server (3) which is configured to provide users with an information and to end the migration transaction in the event of detecting at least one of the cases where the source and target data numbers are not equal or there is a repetitive data in the data list (2). 10. A data migration system (1) by TDMF product according to any of the preceding claims; characterized by the server (3) which is configured to create a task for migrating the related data set by another method in the event of detecting a data set comprising any specific data type in the data list (2). 11. A data migration system (1) by TDMF product according to any of the preceding claims; characterized by the server (3) which is configured to detect data comprising local page data sets. 12. A data migration system (1) by TDMF product according to any of the preceding claims; characterized by the server (3) which is configured to prepare the commands that will enable to put local page data sets out of use. 13. A data migration system (1) by TDMF product according to any of the preceding claims; characterized by the server (3) which is configured to detect the data comprising common or PLPA data sets, to warn the user about migration of these data on their own and to end the transaction. 14. A data migration system (1) by TDMF product according to any of the preceding claims; characterized by the server (3) which is configured to warn the user and to end the process in the event that data comprising dual data set are detected. 15. A data migration system (1) by TDMF product according to any of the preceding claims; characterized by the server (3) which is configured to proceed to the next step if it confronts no problem at the step of analysis of input data. 16. A data migration system (1) by TDMF product according to any of the preceding claims; characterized by the server (3) which is configured to proceed to the step creating the agent task by automatically detecting all systems other than the system that is originally determined in multiple systems before the migration transaction is initiated 17. A data migration system (1) by TDMF product according to any of the preceding claims; characterized by the server (3) which is configured to add this system to the agent task if a new system is added to multiple systems with auto-detect feature. 18. A data migration system (1) by TDMF product according to any of the preceding claims; characterized by the server (3) which is configured to create a main task and run an extra step if the task step conducting the migration transaction does not end as error-free. 19. A data migration system (1) by TDMF product according to any of the preceding claims; characterized by the server (3) which is configured to write the task output at the extra step to a data set and to analyse this data set. 20. A data migration system (1) by TDMF product according to any of the preceding claims; characterized by the server (3) which is configured to detect that data and display it, in the event that a problem occurs in migration of any source data. 21. A data migration system (1) by TDMF product according to any of the preceding claims; characterized by the server (3) which is configured to carry out migration transaction by calling an existing TDMF panel. 22. A data migration system (1) by TDMF product according to any of the preceding claims; characterized by the server (3) which is configured to create a data input task for the purpose of reassigning a data serial number to source data that have a data serial number changing after migration. 23. A data migration system (1) by TDMF product according to any of the preceding claims; characterized by the server (3) which is configured to carry out input transaction by disabling the data in all systems at first. 24. A data migration system (1) by TDMF product according to any of the preceding claims; characterized by the server (3) which is configured to make the data online again in all systems. 25. A data migration system (1) by TDMF product according to any of the preceding claims; characterized by the server (3) which is configured to call scenario for the purpose of accelerating the transaction of making online and offline. 26. A data migration system (1) by TDMF product according to any of the preceding claims; characterized by the server (3) which is configured to receive the operation numbers of data as input by the called scenario and to order them. 27. A data migration system (1) by TDMF product according to any of the preceding claims; characterized by the server (3) which is configured to carry out transaction of making online and offline with the minimum number of command possible by detecting sequential operation intervals after the ordering transaction. 28. A data migration system (1) by TDMF product according to any of the preceding claims; characterized by the server (3) which is configured to prepare a related code and to end the process by getting that data into use again if a data comprising a local page data set is detected before migration.
